title: Frost Rotom Battle Guide
summary: An [Electric]/[Ice] special attacker with [levitate] — [blizzard] and [thunderbolt] dual STAB covers [Dragon], [Flying], [Grass], and [Ground].
strengths: [Electric]/[Ice] STAB covers a massive threat list
weaknesses: Worst defensive profile among Rotom forms
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Frost Rotom is the most offensively aggressive Rotom form. [Electric]/[Ice] STAB covers [Dragon], [Flying], [Grass], [Ground], and [Water]-adjacent targets in a single two-move package, and [levitate] still grants [Ground] immunity. It's the Rotom form that pushes damage over defensive utility.

## Strengths
[blizzard] under snow is a fully accurate spread [Ice] STAB — the ideal pairing with Alolan Ninetales or other snow setters. [thunderbolt] handles [Water] and [Flying] threats not covered by [Ice]. Pivot utility via [volt-switch] remains strong, and [levitate] preserves the signature [Ground] immunity.

## Weaknesses & Answers
The four weaknesses — [Fire], [Rock], [Fighting], [Steel] — are all common meta attack types. [Steel] is particularly threatening because meta [Steel] types often also wall [Ice]. 50 HP keeps the effective bulk low.

## Recommended Moveset
[blizzard] is the spread [Ice] STAB. [thunderbolt] is the reliable [Electric] STAB. [volt-switch] pivots out of bad matchups. [protect] is standard.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[choice-specs] is the default offensive item. [choice-scarf] is the speed variant. [levitate] is mandatory. Tera [Ice] stacks STAB, Tera [Electric] boosts [thunderbolt] and neutralizes [Rock].

## Teammates & Synergy
Snow teams are the ideal home — pair with Alolan Ninetales for automatic [blizzard] accuracy. Cover [Fire] and [Fighting] weaknesses with [Water] and [Fairy] partners.

## Play Patterns
Under snow, spam [blizzard] into the opposing pair. Use [thunderbolt] for [Water] and [Flying] threats, and [volt-switch] to escape [Fire] or [Steel] matchups. Switch out immediately when [Steel] or [Fire] threats appear.
